title: Add a process for adding and removing subprojects
body:
We were asked about adding podman-py to the project, which seems entirely sensible given how strongly related it is. However, we don't actually have a process to do this right now. I added a section on adding and removing subprojects, based on the CNCF governance-by-subprojects template.
